patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+"""Fetch PR diff via GitHub REST API (no checkout)."""
+
+import json
+import os
+
+from github import Auth, Github
+
+from prevue.models import ChangedFile, DiffBundle
+
+
+def load_pr_context() -> tuple[str, int]:
+    repo_full = os.environ["GITHUB_REPOSITORY"]
+    with open(os.environ["GITHUB_EVENT_PATH"]) as f:
+        event = json.load(f)
+    return repo_full, event["pull_request"]["number"]
+
+
+def fetch_diff() -> DiffBundle:
+    repo_full, number = load_pr_context()
+    gh = Github(auth=Auth.Token(os.environ["GITHUB_TOKEN"]))
+    pr = gh.get_repo(repo_full).get_pull(number)
+    files = [
+        ChangedFile(
+            path=f.filename,
+            status=f.status,
+            additions=f.additions,
+            deletions=f.deletions,
+            patch=getattr(f, "patch", None),
+        )
+        for f in pr.get_files()
+    ]
+    return DiffBundle(
+        pr_number=number,
+        base_sha=pr.base.sha,
+        head_sha=pr.head.sha,
+        files=files,
+    )
